achievements.title: Without Looking Back
achievements.description: Defeat Flying Armor as Juste without taking damage or pressing left_right. [ No Red and Blue souls usage][LV.<=4]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Giant's Fall
achievements.description: Defeat Balore as Juste without taking any damage. [No Red and Blue souls usage][LV.<=11]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Sorcerer of Alchemy
achievements.description: Defeat Father Graham without taking any damage barehanded. [Red Soul usage allowed only once, No Item usage][Lv.<=24]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Shadow Wings
achievements.description: Defeat Malphas as Juste without taking any damage barehanded. [No MP Refill Items][Lv.<=26]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Vampiric Crucible of Bartley
achievements.description: Defeat Darius 1st encounter as Juste without taking any damage. [Only Sword or Scythe that available at this point of game, No Red and Blue Souls Usage][Lv.<=29]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: You, Too, Shall Be My Puppet!
achievements.description: Defeat Puppet Master as Juste without taking any damage using only Handgun. [No Red and Blue souls usage, No item Usage]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Release from Cleithrophobia
achievements.description: Defeat Gergoth as Juste without taking damage using only Swords, Greatswords or Rapiers. [No Red and Blue souls][Lv.<=35]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Ahab's Revenge
achievements.description: Defeat Rahab under 1m 30s, while remaining under water entire fight, damageless and only using Thrust, Polearm or Scythe available at this point in the game. You may not touch the ground or platforms at any point. [No Red and Blue souls usage] [Lv.<=38]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Containment of the Multitude
achievements.description: Defeat Bat Company as Juste damageless using only Tomes or Whips. [No Red and Blue souls][Lv.<=41]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Supression of Psychosis
achievements.description: Defeat Paranoia as Juste damageless using only spear weapon. [No Red and Blue souls except Bat Form][Lv.<=43]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Nomex Belmondo
achievements.description: Beat Darius 2nd fight damageless barehanded using only Flame Mine, Holy Flame and Fire Circle. [Don't visit item usage screen][Lv.<=45]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Through the Fire and Flames
achievements.description: Defeat Aguni as Juste damageless using only spear or hammer weapon. [No Red and Blue souls usage except Phase Shift][Lv.<=45]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Gun Del Sol
achievements.description: Defeat Death as Juste damagless using Silver Gun. [No Red and Blue souls usage]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Axel Stone vs The World
achievements.description: Defeat Dio Brando as Juste damageless using only Dark Fist or Great Chair. [No Red and Blue souls][Lv.<=48]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Burton's Prestige
achievements.description: Defeat Abaddon as Juste damageless using whip weapon. [No Red or Blue souls except  Bat Form][Lv.<=51]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Return to Cosmos
achievements.description: Defeat Chaos as Juste damageless. [No Red and Blue souls, No Boss Rush Weapons and Seiryu's Charge][Lv.<=52]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Order of the Simulacrum
achievements.description: Defeat both forms of Dracula damagless barehanded using only souls that he use. [Moonlight Twister and Gaibon Familiar 1st phase,  5th Plague and Necrofiend Familiar 2nd phase][Don't use 5th plague for craft before this challenge][Lv.<=60]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Successor of Achilles
achievements.description: Clear boss rush mode as Juste without using boss rush weapons, Seiryu's Charge, Tome of Culter, Hell Fire Whip and healing of any kind. [Only Icicle Dash, Varla Power, Bat Form and Yellow souls are allowed]
achievements.author: Shmelyoff
